## Fixed
- **Browser-tab favicon (issue #12).** Krusader now shows its own icon in the browser
  tab — the light-blue panes and the white mouse cursor — instead of the dark KasmVNC
  logo that was invisible on a dark tab. The tab favicon is served by the kclient
  wrapper as `/favicon.ico`; the build replaces it (plus the kclient app icon and the
  inner KasmVNC client icons) with a valid multi-size `favicon.ico` (16/32/48/64)
  rendered from the Krusader logo, and asserts on the real file so CI catches any
  future regression.

If you updated and still see the old icon, hard-refresh the tab (Ctrl+F5) or open a
new one. Thanks to **@omarahmed786** for the detailed testing.
